inputs.label: Total Carbohydrates
inputs.businessContext: Amount of carbohydrates in the meal to be consumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of carbohydrates in the meal to be consumed.
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge an Kohlenhydraten in der Mahlzeit, die verzehrt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de glucides dans le repas à consommer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de carbohidratos en la comida a consumir.

inputs.label: Insulin-to-Carb Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Grams of carbohydrate covered by one unit of rapid-acting insulin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams of carbohydrate covered by one unit of rapid-acting insulin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ünite hızlı etkili insülinin kapsadığı gram karbonhidrat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gramm Kohlenhydrate, die von einer Einheit schnell wirkendem Insulin abgedeckt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes de glucides couverts par une unité d'insuline rapide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos de carbohidratos cubiertos por una unidad de insulina de acción rápida.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Yemek öncesi kılcal kan şekeri ölçümü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure capillaire de la glycémie avant le repas.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medición capilar de glucosa sanguínea antes de la comida.

inputs.label: Insulin Sensitivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected drop in blood glucose per unit of insulin (correction factor).

label_i18n.es: Factor de sensibilidad a la insulina

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected drop in blood glucose per unit of insulin (correction factor).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ünite insülin başına beklenen kan şekeri düşüşü (düzeltme faktörü).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Baisse attendue de la glycémie par unité d'insuline (facteur de correction).
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída esperada de glucosa sanguínea por unidad de insulina (factor de corrección).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
